stem: Maya used paint to fill small jars. The function f(x) = -8x + 96 approximates the volume, in fluid ounces, of paint Maya had remaining after filling x jars. Which statement is the best interpretation of the y-intercept of the graph of y = f(x) in the xy-plane in this context?

answerOptions.content: Maya had approximately 96 fluid ounces of paint when she began to fill the jars.
Maya used approximately 8 fluid ounces of paint for each jar.
Maya used approximately 96 fluid ounces of paint for each jar.
Maya had approximately 8 fluid ounces of paint when she began to fill the jars.

rationale: Choice A is correct. The y-intercept of y = f(x) occurs at x = 0 (zero jars filled), where f(0) = 96. This represents the initial amount of paint Maya had before filling any jars: 96 fluid ounces. Choice B describes the slope, not the y-intercept. Choices C and D mix up the slope and y-intercept values.
